---
pagetitle: "Home"
title: "Md. Jubayer Hossain"
subtitle: "Researcher, Educator & Entrepreneur"
page-layout: full
toc: false
image: files/profiles/jubayer.png
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 10cm
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:contact.jubayerhossain@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hossainmj/
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}}"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=9_K4ekoAAAAJ&hl=en&authuser=5
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}}"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9323-4997
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/hossainlab
    - icon: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/JHossain_28

---

## Bio

I am the Founder and Chief Executive Officer of [DeepBio Limited](https://deepbioltd.com/), and the Founder and Executive Director of [CHIRAL Bangladesh](https://chiralbd.org/), its dedicated research wing. I also serve as Faculty at the [Center for Bioinformatics Learning Advancement and Systematics Training (cBLAST), University of Dhaka](https://cblast.du.ac.bd/), and as a Visiting Researcher in the [Department of Public Health, Daffodil International University](https://daffodilvarsity.edu.bd/department/ph). At Daffodil International University, I also teach in the [Micro-Credential Academy](https://microcredentials.daffodilvarsity.edu.bd/) as an Instructor for the course AI for Public Health.

As an educator, I am Lead Organizer and Instructor at the [Professional Training in Bioinformatics and Computational Biology](https://academy.deepbioltd.com/). I also serve as Program Lead for the [GSA Bioinformatics Internship](https://gsabioinfointernship.owlstown.net/), a collaborative initiative jointly organized by the Global Network of Bangladeshi Biotechnologists (GNOBB), ASI School of Life, and the Society for the Popularization of Science, Bangladesh (SPSB).

I completed my Master of Science (2020) and Bachelor of Science (2019) in Microbiology from [Jagannath University](https://jnu.ac.bd/department/portal/microbiology). My research focuses on applying artificial intelligence (AI) to health data—including multi-omics datasets (genomics, transcriptomics, proteomics) and neuroimaging—to identify clinically actionable biomarkers and build predictive models for the early diagnosis and treatment of neurological disorders and cancer. I am also passionate about visualizing complex data and models to improve biological interpretation and support clinical applications.

Please [contact me](mailto:contact.jubayerhossain@gmail.com) to discuss potential opportunities.
